name: @emilia-protocol/crash-test
description: The EMILIA crash test: one command shows a high-risk action blocked, dual-approved by two named humans on their own devices, issued as an authorization receipt, then verified OFFLINE with EMILIA gone — and a forged copy rejected. Produces an audit-grade Workpaper Package. Runs the real EP-QUORUM-v1 predicate. Scenarios: default finance, --scenario clinical (high-alert medication double-check), --scenario procurement (hospital capital purchase).
